zh.lifeSummary: 當Iye Hugh Eth Mackie於大約1165年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Máel Coluim mac Máil Brigti, Mormaer of Moray70歲，母親Mariotte MacGillebride47歲。他於大約1188年與Mariotte MacGillebride在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1215年享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Iye Hugh Eth Mackie于大约1165年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲Máel Coluim mac Máil Brigti, Mormaer of Moray70岁，母亲Mariotte MacGillebride47岁。他于大约1188年与Mariotte MacGillebride在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1215年享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mackie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Aoidh or Mac Aodha ‘son of Aodh’, a personal name meaning ‘fire’. Compare McKie , McKee , and McKay .

nameMeanings.name: Iye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a variant spelling of Ty or a transferred use of the surname, a local name for someone who lived by a common pasture, Middle English tye.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: Eth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (from a Hebrew word meaning ‘appointed, placed’), borne by the third son of Adam, who was born after the murder of Abel (Genesis 4:25, ‘And Adam knew his wife again; and she bare a son, and called his name Seth: For God, said she, hath appointed me another seed instead of Abel, whom Cain slew’). It is recorded in England from the 1400s and was popular among the Puritans (particularly for children born after the death of an elder sibling). By the 20th century it had become rare. It was used for the darkly passionate rural character Seth Starkadder in  Stella Gibbons's  satirical novel Cold Comfort Farm (  1932 ), and has recently enjoyed a revival .

en.lifeSummary: When Iye Hugh Eth Mackie was born about 1165, in Scotland, his father, Máel Coluim mac Máil Brigti, Mormaer of Moray, was 70 and his mother, Mariotte MacGillebride, was 47. He married Mariotte MacGillebride about 1188, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died about 1215, at the age of 52.

fr.Gigha, Argyll, Scotland: Gigha, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Iye Hugh Eth Mackie est né environ 1165, à Écosse, son père, Máel Coluim mac Máil Brigti, Mormaer of Moray, avait 70 ans et sa mère, Mariotte MacGillebride, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Mariotte MacGillebride environ 1188, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé environ 1215, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.Gigha, Argyll, Scotland: Gigha, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Iye Hugh Eth Mackie um 1165 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Máel Coluim mac Máil Brigti, Mormaer of Moray 70 und seine Mutter Mariotte MacGillebride 47. Er hat um 1188 in Scotland Mariotte MacGillebride geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb um 1215 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Iye Hugh Eth Mackie è nato il circa 1165 nel Scotland, il suo padre, Máel Coluim mac Máil Brigti, Mormaer of Moray, aveva 70 anni e il suo madre, Mariotte MacGillebride, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Mariotte MacGillebride circa 1188, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì circa 1215, all'età di 52 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Iye Hugh Eth Mackie(이)가 대략 1165년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Máel Coluim mac Máil Brigti, Mormaer of Moray(은)는 70세였고, 그의 어머니 Mariotte MacGillebride(은)는 47세였다. 그는 대략 1188년 스컷랜드에서 Mariotte MacGillebride(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1215년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Mariotte MacGillebride около 1188 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер около 1215 г. в возрасте 52 лет.
